allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\laragon", "D:\\laragon", "C:\\Program Files\\laragon", "C:\\Users\\lrojas\\laragon"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "ENCONTRADO: $p"; Get-ChildItem $p | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Host "NO existe: $p" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\laragon" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Attributes; Write-Host "Tamaño total:"; \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\laragon" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\laragon" -Recurse -Depth 5 -Filter "mysql.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Host "---"; $env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "mysql|laragon|maria" })
